subject: [PATCH 04/24] nfsd: add protocol support for CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds protocol support for CB_NOTIFY in the nfsd module. It updates the xdr files and removes duplicate definitions from various header files. The changes include adding new enum values, updating typedefs, and regenerating the xdr files. This is part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve the NFSv4.x protocol implementation in the Linux kernel.
